title: Umbraix Jobs
description: A modern, feature-rich jobs plugin for Minecraft servers, offering customizable careers, dynamic missions, team play, and a sleek GUI—built for performance and player engagement.
body:
# Umbraix Jobs [v1.2.0] – Missions, Teams & Discord-Ready Advancement Plugin

**Umbraix Jobs** is your all-in-one, professional-grade jobs and progression plugin for Minecraft servers (Paper 1.21.1+). Packed with rich features like dynamic jobs, mission objectives, collaborative teams, and Discord integration, this plugin brings a high-end experience—without the price tag. Built for performance, polished with modern UI, and crafted with community-first principles, Umbraix Jobs is the ultimate tool for server owners who demand more.

---

## 🔧 Core Features

### 💼 Jobs System
- **Custom Job Creation**: Define roles like Miner, Farmer, Hunter, and more in `config.yml`.
- **Leveling & Prestige**: XP-based progression system with support for prestige tiers.
- **Flexible Rewards**: Assign XP and money rewards to blocks, mobs, events—fully customizable.
- **Placeholder Support**: Use dynamic placeholders for jobs, rewards, and stats across your server.

### 🧭 Missions Engine *(New in 1.2.0!)*
- **Mission Templates**: Easily add job-specific missions (mining, hunting, farming, etc.).
- **Dynamic Objectives**: Randomized and timed missions per player with unique goals.
- **Real-Time Progress Tracking**: Live updates, colorful feedback messages, and persistent progress.
- **Configurable Rewards**: Tie XP and money payouts to mission success—custom rules supported.

### 👥 Team System *(New in 1.2.0!)*
- **Team Creation & Management**: Players can create, invite, join, leave, and manage teams.
- **XP Sharing**: Share XP within teams at configurable percentages, per job type.
- **Persistent Data**: Team data auto-saves, ensuring consistency across restarts.
- **Feedback & Announcements**: Color-coded action messages for all team events.

### 🖼️ Modern GUI System *(Upgraded in 1.2.0!)*
- **Intuitive Menus**: Navigate jobs, missions, and teams via sleek, item-based GUIs.
- **Action Buttons**: One-click access to info, stats, and management tools.
- **Live Notifications**: Level-ups, rewards, and mission updates displayed via GUI & action bars.
- **Professional Design**: Clean layout, smooth transitions, and immersive visual experience.

### 💬 Custom Messaging
- **Action Feedback**: Colorful real-time messages for block breaking, farming, hunting, and more.
- **Configurable Alerts**: Customize every message in `config.yml` with color codes and placeholders.
- **Prestige Milestones**: Server-wide announcements for major player achievements.

---

## 🌐 Discord Integration *(New in 1.2.0!)*
- **Webhook Support**: Send job events and mission completions directly to your Discord channels.
- **DiscordSRV Compatibility**: Seamless integration with player-linked Discord accounts.
- **Configurable Events**: Control what gets sent, from level-ups to team activity.
- **Boost Engagement**: Keep your community connected across platforms.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration & Integration

- **Fully YAML Configurable**: Jobs, missions, teams, GUIs, messages, and webhooks are all in your hands.
- **Supports Popular Plugins**: Hooks into Vault, EssentialsX, TheNewEconomy, and more.
- **Modular Design**: Easily extend or disable features you don't need.
- **Optimized for Performance**: Async data processing, smart caching, and error-resistant design ensure smooth operation—even on busy servers.

---

## 📦 Version 1.2.0 – May 2025 Highlights

- **NEW**: Fully integrated **Mission System** with progress tracking and rewards.
- **NEW**: **Team System** with XP sharing, member management, and persistent storage.
- **NEW**: Modular **GUI menus** for Jobs, Missions, and Teams with a polished UI.
- **NEW**: **DiscordSRV and Webhook support** for plugin events and milestones.
- **IMPROVED**: Config structure, placeholder support, and internal codebase.
- **FIXED**: XP bugs, GUI glitches, command issues, and data handling reliability.

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. Drop the plugin JAR into your `/plugins/` directory.
2. Restart your Minecraft server.
3. Open `/plugins/Umbraix-Jobs/config.yml` to customize jobs, missions, teams, and webhooks.
4. In-game, use:
   - `/jobs` – View or join jobs.
   - `/jobs gui` – Launch the interactive GUI.
   - `/jobs team` – Access team management.

---

## 💡 Why Choose Umbraix Jobs?

- Professionally designed UI/UX
- Deep job and mission customization
- Built-in team collaboration and XP sharing
- Community-first, developer-maintained, and always free
- Future-ready with a modular, extensible architecture

---

📢 **Join the Umbraix Community for support, feedback, and previews:**  
**[https://discord.gg/SJ9bDV5vPg](https://discord.gg/SJ9bDV5vPg)**

Elevate your Minecraft server with **Umbraix Jobs v1.2.0**—the definitive jobs plugin for modern survival, RPG, and adventure servers.

---
